heroHeadline: Bloomberg: Ukraine and Russia Moving Toward Peace Deal as Easter Truce Holds
heroSubtitle: Bloomberg reports significant diplomatic movement toward a potential peace deal — following both sides' agreement to the Orthodox Easter ceasefire, the first bilateral ceasefire commitment of the full-scale invasion
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
